umm.digiquilt.server
Class QuiltZeroconf

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.server.QuiltZeroconf

public class QuiltZeroconf
extends Object

A class to provide a single place to perform zeroconf related tasks for DigiQuilt specifically.

Version:
$Revision: 1.4 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-07-23 22:15:14 $

Constructor Summary
QuiltZeroconf(javax.jmdns.JmDNS jmdns)
          Create a new QuiltZeroconf
QuiltZeroconf(javax.jmdns.JmDNS jmdns, SocketFactory factory)
          Create a new QuiltZeroconf object, which will use the given SocketFactory to make connections.
 
Method Summary
 void addServiceListener(javax.jmdns.ServiceListener listener)
          Add a DigiQuilt service listener.
 DQPClient getConnection(String serverName)
          Get a connection to the given server.
 DQPClient getConnection(String serverName, int timeout)
          Try to get a connection to the given server.
 boolean registerServer(String serverName)
          Advertise a DigiQuilt server on at this location with the given name over mDNS.
 void removeServiceListener(javax.jmdns.ServiceListener listener)
          Remove a DigiQuilt service listener.
 void unregisterAll()
          Unregister all services from mDNS.

clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

Method Detail

registerServer

public boolean registerServer(String serverName)
Advertise a DigiQuilt server on at this location with the given name over mDNS.

Parameters:
serverName - The name for the server
Returns:
true if the service was successfully registered

unregisterAll

public void unregisterAll()
Unregister all services from mDNS.

addServiceListener

public void addServiceListener(javax.jmdns.ServiceListener listener)
Add a DigiQuilt service listener.

Parameters:
listener -

removeServiceListener

public void removeServiceListener(javax.jmdns.ServiceListener listener)
Remove a DigiQuilt service listener.

Parameters:
listener -

getConnection

public DQPClient getConnection(String serverName)
                        throws IOException
Get a connection to the given server. This method could potentially block for a while as the server is found, so don't call it from the event thread.

Parameters:
serverName -
Returns:
a DQPClient connection to the server, or null if the server could not be found.
Throws:
IOException

getConnection

public DQPClient getConnection(String serverName,
                               int timeout)
                        throws IOException
Try to get a connection to the given server.

Parameters:
serverName - The name of the server to try to connect to.
timeout - The time to spend trying to find the server before giving up, in milliseconds.
Returns:
A DQPClient connection to the server, or null if the server could not be found before the timeout.
Throws:
IOException
